name: v18 v08 mode1 stock canbox + raw CAN stream + decoded vehicle snapshot
usb_identity: unchanged stock CDC/proprietary canbox interface; no gs_usb
mode1_policy: programmer canbox logic remains default and runs immediately

sideband_commands.0x76: pop one raw C-CAN/M-CAN frame from RAM ring
sideband_commands.0x77: read decoded vehicle snapshot: speed/rpm/temperatures/voltage/brake/gear and reserved OBD-like fields

vehicle_snapshot_payload: status, known24, counter_le32, speed_kmh_u16, rpm_u16, coolant_c_s16, voltage_mv_u16, throttle_pct_u8, brake_u8, gear_u8, fuel_pct_u8, outside_c_s16, fuel_rate_x10_u16, odometer_km_u32, reserved2
raw_frame_payload: status, bus(0=C-CAN 1=M-CAN), flags(bit0=EXT bit1=RTR), dlc, reserved, id_le32, data[8]
hook_policy: hooks run after the stock FIFO read, then return with the stock release-FIFO arguments restored
